summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend tests of the Regenerate Invoice and Invoice Preview features. 11/11 backend pytest cases pass (preview math, force-regen update/recreate/InvoiceNotRegenerableError flow, role gating, invoices-list regen 400-not-linked). Frontend Invoices list correctly renders per-row regenerate-invoice-{id} icon buttons (4 found, e.g. cbb2c578-3c75-460d-9083-117adc1f43a9). The Distributor-detail Preview & Generate / Regenerate buttons could not be exercised end-to-end for the supplied delivery 3c714fda-021f-4c8d-8d92-dc03f04b5b08 because that delivery is in REVERSED state in the seed db — the panel intentionally hides retry-zoho-push-btn / regenerate-invoice-btn for reversed rows. The handlers, dialogs (invoice-preview-dialog, invoice-preview-table, preview-confirm-push-btn, regenerate-confirm-dialog) and canRegenerate guard are present and correctly wired in source.
action_items: (Optional) Seed a NON-invoiced, NON-reversed distributor delivery in nyla-air-water tenant so the Preview & Generate dialog can be exercised end-to-end in UI tests. The reference delivery (3c714fda...) is REVERSED so the panel correctly hides retry-zoho-push-btn — not a regression.
critical_code_review_comments: zoho_service.create_invoice_for_delivery's PUT-then-void-then-POST regen branch correctly preserves regen_mode in the mapping doc and only POSTs on the recreate fallback (verified by call-capture).
Both regenerate routes (distributors.py:5232 and invoices.py:825) share an _INVOICE_REGEN_ROLES set — consider extracting to a single core/auth module to avoid drift between the two endpoints.

DistributorDetail.js logs a Radix `Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent` warning when opening the delivery detail dialog. Not blocking but accessibility nit — add a DialogDescription to silence it.

Frontend preview dialog disables Confirm & Push only when missing_agreed_price_skus is non-empty — confirmed via source. Recommend also disabling when net_taxable_amount <= 0 to avoid pushing a zero-value invoice.
InvoicesList resolve uses zoho_invoice_number OR zoho_invoice_id only; an invoice whose mapping has been deleted (orphan) will hit the 400 'not linked' path — friendly message present, OK.

success_rate.frontend: Invoices list regenerate button verified; DistributorDetail preview dialog could not be exercised because the supplied delivery is REVERSED.

test_credentials: CEO: surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth / test123 (login returns session_token, used as Bearer).
seed_data_creation: None — service-level tests use monkeypatched zoho_service.db; HTTP tests use the real CEO session against the live nyla-air-water tenant and only read.
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_iteration_invoice_regen_preview.py covers the new regenerate + preview features. The HTTP tests auto-read REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. To exercise the DistributorDetail preview & regenerate dialogs in Playwright, you need a Stock-Out delivery whose state is NOT 'reversed' and (for Regenerate) one that already has a synced Zoho mapping. The supplied delivery 3c714fda-021f-4c8d-8d92-dc03f04b5b08 is reversed in seed data so its row hides those buttons by design.
